chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D333of 2013: Muhammad Aslam & others vs. T.M.A. K.N.Shah &others. For the Petitioners: Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr.Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl A.G. Sindh. Dates of hearing: 23.02.2022 Date of announcement: 23.02.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners claim to have been engaged on a contractual / temporary basis by the respondents in 2011 and seek regularization of their services. The respondents have filed their reply, stating that the documents relied upon by the petitioners are fake, forged and fabricated. No counter has been filed by the petitioners to the averments of the respondents herein. In view hereof it is apparent that no vested rights could be demonstrated by the petitioners before us to merit the invocation of writ jurisdiction of this Court and even if the respondents’ claim of fake documentation was disputed, such question was not amenable for resolution in the writ jurisdiction of this Court.In view hereof this petition is found to devoid of merits, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
